Agent.Name: Mxsend

Variable.Help: Sender's full Matrix user ID, e.g. @bot:matrix.server.org
Password for the Matrix account. Avoid characters that Unraid treats as INI comments: # and ; — they will break config display.
Recipient — a room ID (!room:server) or user ID (@user:server)
Recovery key for E2EE device verification (set to 'none' to disable)
Fields included in the notification title
Fields included in the notification message body

Agent.Script:
#!/bin/bash ############ {0} ############ export MXSEND_FROM="$FROM" export MXSEND_PASSWORD="$PASSWORD" export MXSEND_TO="$TO" if [ "$RECOVERY_KEY" != "none" ]; then export MXSEND_RECOVERY_KEY="$RECOVERY_KEY" fi
MESSAGE_BODY="$(echo -e "**$(hostname)** — $TITLE\n\n$MESSAGE")" /usr/local/bin/mxsend "$MESSAGE_BODY"
